title: 🧠 Results of the first 2 months of my trading AI — Draconic
author: Arshfutures
selftext:
Hey everyone,  
I’ve been testing my trading AI **Draconic** for about 2 months now in real market conditions, mainly on crypto and index pairs. It’s been a fun but intense learning curve, and here are some early results:

📊 **Stats so far:**  
• 61% average accuracy on directional calls  
• 43/60 trading days ended positive  
• Average daily P&L: **+0.82%**  
• Largest daily loss: **–0.11%**  
• Total cumulative gain: **+63% (no leverage)**  
• Hypothetical with x5 leverage: **\~+870%** (not tested live)

These are raw outputs from the model — not accounting for slippage, fees, or execution gaps — but it’s showing consistent signals and smart adaptation around volatility spikes.

I’ve been working on this as a personal project for a while (background in trading + building AI tools).  
Recently I launched a small dashboard where Draconic’s daily signals are posted automatically — I’m just testing it out with a few traders for feedback.

Would love to hear your thoughts on it —  
👉 What kind of data or features would you find useful if you were testing an AI-based trade predictor?
